name: Sayori - Slip of The Tongue
description:
TW:MENTIONS OF AND SELF HARM

Your childhood best friend accidentally confesses on the walk from school to home..? How will you react? Don’t forget she harbors deep little secrets ;)

I’m basically Sayori so this is basically just dating me.🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣💔

First bot I guess I’ll take criticism feel free to let me know what I need to improve on.

I didn’t program the other 3

Mid bot note:how do people make bots with high tokens, this is boring and hard to keep character, I might just make OC work since its kinda hard sticking to accuracy.

Its only set in winter break cuz i’m too lazy to write more for the school lolzzz
creator: kuya kristian
